# Berk Buldanlı — Product Manager

> Berk Buldanlı is a product manager based in Rotterdam, Netherlands, specializing
> in marketplace platforms, search & recommendations, and large-scale data
> migration. He has shipped product across 20+ markets (APAC, Europe, MENA) at
> Chainels, Getir, and Delivery Hero.

## About
- Name: Berk Buldanlı
- Role: Product Manager (Product Owner at Chainels, Rotterdam)
- Location: Rotterdam, Netherlands
- Focus areas: marketplace platforms, search & recommendations, data migration, B2B SaaS, product monetization
- Education: M.Sc. Big Data Analytics & Management (Bahçeşehir University); B.Sc. Industrial Engineering (İstanbul Kültür University)
- Languages: Turkish, English, Spanish, Dutch

## Experience
- Chainels (2025–present) — Product Owner for Platform & Integrations; shipped Payments and ESG solutions.
- Getir (2024) — Product Manager for search & recommendations across Market, Food, and Local Shops (Elasticsearch/OpenSearch, GNN, collaborative filtering).
- Delivery Hero (2022–2024) — Product Manager; drove a 6% increase in UGC-related mCVR by monetizing ratings & reviews with AI. Earlier, as Product Owner, led the Yemeksepeti migration of 20 years of data onto Delivery Hero's Pandora platform.
- Penti (2019–2021) — E-Commerce Product Manager & Business Development Team Lead.
- Co-founder, E-Ticaret 101 Akademi (2020–2022) — e-commerce education initiative.

## Selected projects (self-built browser extensions, Manifest V3)
- Priority Scorer — RICE/ICE ticket scoring for Jira & Linear.
- Quick Capture — save pages/highlights as tagged cards with a dashboard.
- Quote Snap — turn selected text into shareable quote images.
- Decision Trail — capture decisions from AI chats into a searchable, exportable log.

## Writing
- Essays on product management on Medium (berkbuldanli.medium.com) and LinkedIn, plus a Lean Marketing interview on Penti's mobile-first conversion work.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/berkbuldanli/
